claim: SNIRH (snirh.apambiente.pt) provides freely accessible real-time and historical data on Algarve reservoir storage, precipitation, streamflow, groundwater, and flood zones — the primary authoritative computational data source for building the territorial water layer.
stance_target: SNIRH as the recommended data source for reservoir and river monitoring in the territorial knowledge layer
scope_conditions: Portugal; SNIRH operational since 1995/1997; data licensed for reuse with attribution
quoted_support: É permitido o uso dos conteúdos deste site, desde que mencionada a sua fonte. [Content may be used with attribution.] Boletim Armazenamento Albufeiras — Abril 2026 [Reservoir Storage Bulletin — April 2026 available]

claim: SNIRH includes dedicated flood zone mapping (SVARH GIS — Zonas Inundáveis e de Risco de Inundações) providing spatial data on inundation risk zones across Portugal including the Algarve — directly usable for hazard layer encoding.
stance_target: SNIRH flood zone GIS as data source for flood/seasonal inundation hazard layer in rescue system
quoted_support: SVARH: Zonas Inundáveis e de Risco de Inundações (SIG) — Marcas de Referência — Relatório da Cartografia de Inundações
